meta.description:
5 AI Video Editing Apps You NEED to Try in 2025

In this video I walk you through the 5 best AI video editor you need to try in 2025. With these Ai video editing softwares you can speed up your video editing process, generate entire videos with ai and make AI VFX in seconds. 

Tools mentioned

Aivideo - https://www.aivideo.com/?promocode=dankieft
They run a limited free trial, with code DAN20 you get 20% off.

Filmora - https://bit.ly/3CQKSBD

Opus Clip - https://bit.ly/3CWfCB6

Firecut - https://firecut.ai/?ref=dan

Runway - https://runwayml.com/


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.
